objective: Manual multilingual outreach for the 1000-download sprint

policy.automation: Generate packs and tracking rows only; do not send emails, DMs, comments, or submissions automatically.
policy.personalization: Every outbound message must be manually reviewed and adapted before sending.
policy.disclosure: Disclose that Jonathan is the solo developer of Oasis.
policy.claims: Do not make medical claims around insomnia, anxiety, tinnitus, babies, or treatment.

tracks.label: iOS app curators
tracks.angle: A native iPhone ambient sound mixer that is offline-first and not another subscription.
tracks.subject: Oasis: a no-subscription iPhone sound mixer for sleep and focus

tracks.label: Sleep and focus creators
tracks.angle: 35 offline nature sounds, binaural tracks, spatial placement, timer, and background playback.
tracks.subject: A quiet iPhone app for sleep, focus, and travel noise

tracks.label: French wellbeing and tech curators
tracks.angle: Une app iPhone de sons de nature, utilisable hors ligne, avec achat unique.
tracks.subject: Oasis: sons de nature sur iPhone, sans abonnement

tracks.label: German privacy/offline app curators
tracks.angle: Offline nature sounds, clear pricing, and a one-time unlock instead of a subscription.
tracks.subject: Oasis: offline nature sounds for iPhone, no subscription

tracks.label: Spanish sleep/focus curators
tracks.angle: Sonidos de lluvia y naturaleza para dormir o concentrarse, sin suscripcion.
tracks.subject: Oasis: sonidos de naturaleza para iPhone, sin suscripcion

tracks.label: Italian and Brazilian local tests
tracks.angle: Localized App Store pages and localized short videos for Italy and Brazil.
